# AC-01: AI Risk Tier Classification

**Track:** AI Controls (`AC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

For changes that introduce, modify, or interact with AI components: classify the EU AI Act risk tier (minimal/limited/high/unacceptable) and trigger the corresponding compliance requirements for all downstream stages. Not applicable to changes with no AI component.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 1 | Intent Ingestion | Conditional | *Only applicable when the change introduces, modifies, or interacts with AI components.*

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent proposes, human confirms |
| **Agent does** | Analyse the specification for AI component involvement; propose EU AI Act risk tier with rationale referencing Art. 6 and Annex III. |
| **Human does** | Review proposed tier and rationale; confirm or override with documented justification. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Validated feature specification | QC-01 | Specification reviewed for AI component involvement. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| AI Act risk tier classification | decision | Confirmed risk tier with rationale and list of triggered compliance obligations for downstream stages. | 7 years (AI Act) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | escalate |
| **Escalate to** | AI Governance Lead |

If tier cannot be determined, escalate to AI Governance Lead. Default to highest applicable tier pending resolution.

## Dependencies

- `QC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| EU AI Act | Art. 6 | Classification rules for high-risk AI systems |
| EU AI Act | Annex III | List of high-risk AI applications; determines applicable compliance obligations |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** AI Governance · **Owner role:** AI Governance Lead
